subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen giveth the glad-tidings of the bounties of the All-Merciful unto the people of Bahá, and counselleth all that they may attain
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اهل بها را بفیوضات رحمانیه بشارت میدهد و جمیع را نصیحت میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @belief and denial, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital
